message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): add witness publication protocol, GC coordinator, and proof-carrying validation (bd-3t3.9.3)

Implement §5.6.4.7-5.6.4.9: four-phase publication protocol (reserve/
write/commit/abort) with linear ReservationToken for cancel-safety,
CommitMarkerStore for marker discipline, WitnessGcCoordinator with
safe_gc_seq computation and epoch advancement safety checks, and
ProofCarryingValidator trait for distributed proof-carrying replication.
18 new tests (443 total in fsqlite-mvcc).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
